zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery de Lacy於1226年出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾亞-拉希時，她的父親John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland18歲，母親Isabel le Bigod16歲。她於1244年8月14日之前與Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath在英國英格蘭賀福爾結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。她去世於1256年在英國英格蘭爾黑阿德爾享年30歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯特利姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery de Lacy于1226年出生在英国英格兰賀福爾艾亞-拉希时，她的父亲John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland18岁，母亲Isabel le Bigod16岁。她于1244年8月14日之前与Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath在英国英格兰賀福爾结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。她去世于1256年在英国英格兰爾黑阿德爾享年30岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯特利姆。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lacy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Lassy in Calvados, named from a Gaulish personal name Lascius (of uncertain origin and meaning) + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lasee
meanings: Probably an altered form of English or Irish   Lacy  .

variants.name: Lacey
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Lacy  .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery de Lacy was born in 1226, in Ewyas-Lacey, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, was 18 and her mother, Isabel le Bigod, was 16. She married Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath before 14 August 1244, in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. She died in 1256, in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 30, and was buried in Trim, County Meath, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery de Lacy est née en 1226, à Ewyas-Lacey, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Isabel le Bigod, avait 16 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath avant 14 août 1244, à Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Elle est décédée en 1256, à Cheadle, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à Trim, County Meath, Irlande.

de.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Margery de Lacy 1226 in Ewyas-Lacey, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland 18 und ihre Mutter Isabel le Bigod 16. Sie hat vor 14. August 1244 in Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Sie starb 1256 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Cheadle, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Trim, County Meath, Irland begraben.

it.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Lacy è nata il nel 1226 nel Ewyas-Lacey, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, aveva 18 anni e sua madre, Isabel le Bigod, aveva 16 anni. Lei sposato Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath prima del 14 agosto 1244, nel Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì nel 1256, nel Cheadle, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery de Lacyが1226年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウヤス-レイセイで生まれた時，父John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Irelandは18歳，母Isabel le Bigodは16歳であった。1244年8月14日以前にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアでSir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeathと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼女は1256年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアチェアドルで30歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ メアストリムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery de Lacy(이)가 1226년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 와이아스-레이스이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland(은)는 18세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isabel le Bigod(은)는 16세였다. 그녀는 1244년 8월 14일 이전 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르에서 Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1256년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 체아들일에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 미스 트림에 묻혔다.

pt.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery de Lacy nasceu em 1226, em Ewyas-Lacey, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Isabel le Bigod, tinha 16 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath antes 14 de agosto de 1244, em Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1256, em Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.

ro.Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, England, Un: Ewyas Harold, Herefordshire, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery de Lacy родилась в 1226 г. в местности ювяс-леиси, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Isabel le Bigod, 16. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath перед 14 августа 1244 г. в местности хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Она умерла в 1256 г. в местности чидл, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности трим, коунти мит, Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery de Lacy nació en 1226, en Ewyas-Lacey, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, John FitzGeoffrey Lord of Shere and Justiciar of Ireland, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Isabel le Bigod, tenía 16 años. Se casó con Sir John de Verdun, Baron of Westmeath antes de 14 de agosto de 1244, en Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió en 1256, en Cheadle, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en Trim, County Meath, Irlanda.
